module.title: ABC Electronics India - SAP TM End-to-End Implementation

topic.title: Lab 1: Customer Order to Transportation Demand

learningObjectives.title: Understand customer demand to transportation demand flow
learningObjectives.description: Follow the business flow from Sales Order to Freight Unit creation in SAP TM.

learningObjectives.title: Validate transportation demand readiness
learningObjectives.description: Review delivery relevance, verify master data and confirm demand is planning-ready.

learningObjectives.title: Troubleshoot Freight Unit generation issues
learningObjectives.description: Identify and resolve common production issues related to missing replication data.

learningObjectives.title: Apply consultant-style analysis
learningObjectives.description: Think through root-cause questions and corrective actions like a transportation consultant.

sections.title: Real-Time Lab 1: Customer Order to Transportation Demand

sections.content: You have joined ABC Electronics India as a Junior SAP TM Consultant. The company manufactures laptops, monitors and networking equipment. Your project team has recently completed SAP TM implementation, and today is the first production day. Your responsibility is to support the transportation planning team.

sections.title: Your Role
sections.content: You are working as the SAP TM Transportation Planner responsible for converting customer demand into transportation planning.

At 9:00 AM, Reliance Digital places an urgent order for 500 laptops. The customer has a premium service agreement requiring delivery within 24 hours. The Sales team creates the Sales Order in SAP S/4HANA.

items: Ensure all required master data exists.
Allow SAP TM to generate the Freight Unit.
Confirm that the transportation demand is ready for planning.

sections.title: Think Like a Consultant
rows: Why is no Freight Order created yet?
Why is Freight Unit created first?
It is the planning object used by SAP TM.
What happens if location master data is missing?
Transportation demand cannot be planned correctly.
Which system created the Sales Order?

sections.content: The planner notices that the Freight Unit was not generated automatically. Investigation reveals that the customer's ship-to location was never replicated into SAP TM. Because the planning location is missing, SAP TM cannot generate transportation demand.

sections.title: Consultant Resolution
sections.content: Verify Business Partner replication, check location master data, replicate the missing customer location from SAP S/4HANA, regenerate the transportation demand and confirm that the Freight Unit is created successfully.

sections.title: Project Learning
sections.content: Whenever Freight Units are not generated, always verify master data replication before investigating planning configuration. Missing locations and Business Partners are among the most common production issues.

sections.title: Accenture Viva Question
sections.content: A Freight Unit was not generated after an Outbound Delivery was created. What would you check first? A strong answer is: verify delivery relevance, Business Partner replication, location master data, transportation relevance and integration between SAP S/4HANA and SAP TM.

items: Master data issue identified and resolved.
Project continues to Lab 2: Transportation Planning & Carrier Selection.
